programme.desc: The power of the Holy Spirit in conviction, conversion and living. John 14 (Sacramento 1983).

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: Impact for Life

programme.desc: Follows Natasha, furious that her closest friends are all having babies. When she is unexpectedly landed with a baby of her own, her life dramatically implodes and twists into a surreal horror show.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Inexplicably reunited with the baby, Natasha scrambles to locate his mother and uncovers an alarming pattern of events on a thumb drive.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Despite Mrs Eaves' shocking solution to her baby problem, Natasha finds herself willing to do anything in exchange for her help, even if it's the herculean task of nap time.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: With the baby now in Bobbi's hands, Natasha must reunite with her mother, Barbara, whom she hasn't seen in 15 years.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: As Natasha and Mrs Eaves remain trapped in Barbara's summer solstice ritual, the baby's complicated origin, connection to Mrs Eaves, and trauma-filled path to Natasha are revealed.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Desperate to leave the Jupiter House, Natasha, Bobbi, and Mrs Eaves find their plans thwarted by the chaos and destruction of the other suddenly possessed children.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: In a last-ditch effort to break the curse, a severely weakened yet determined Mrs Eaves sets off with Natasha in pursuit of Jack.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Natasha decides to give the baby exactly what he's after amid growing concerns from her father, Lyle, Bobbi, and Mrs Eaves, who each go to great lengths to ensure her survival.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: A pop star preparing for her triumphant return to the music industry develops a complicated relationship with a modern-day cult leader.

programme.title: The Idol

programme.title: The Idol

programme.desc: Teen Justin has worked tirelessly to save nearly 80 acres in the Rainforests of Ecuador, home to many species of frogs. Lacey and her team are throwing him Rainforest Celebration to honour his efforts.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Sophie volunteers at Ride On Therapeutic Horsemanship Center, assisting young riders and caring for the animals. Now, Lacey teams up with Lisa and Marisa to celebrate Sophie with a pre-Bat Mitzvah Party at the Barn.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Claim What Is Yours Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Scrapping the Sultans Stinging Stickers of Selfishness
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness always seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary and Lee's daughter has brought up memories of Rosemary's own mother and questions about her past. Meanwhile, the kids feel left out of the hot springs with all the tourists.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Normally Joni Eareckson is the host of the show. This week she's the guest and shares her perspective on many of the issues we are dealing with today on 'A Very Tall Man'. You may be surprised by some of her answers.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Soul Sessions

programme.title: Joel Osteen

programme.title: Prone to Wander

programme.title: Kids Beach Club

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament

programme.desc: Partially deaf himself, high school senior Jonah volunteers at 'No Limits' a nonprofit teaching deaf children skills. Now, Lacey and her team are ready to throw this teen role model a true Hollywood red carpet gala.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Teacher Adrien Murphy is the founder of after school program Kindness Club, where she inspires kids to give back to the community. Lacey shows Adrien that kindness comes back to you with a surprise Glamp-out to remember.

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: The power of the Holy Spirit in conviction, conversion and living. John 14 (Sacramento 1983).

programme.title: GGC Life TV

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Jesus Saves, Heals and Renews Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part one of Your Checklist for Prayer, Pastor Bayless encourages you to think about an important question before you pray: Is your request promised in the Bible?

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: You are the temple of the Holy Spirit, chosen and set apart for His glory to dwell and shine through you.

programme.sub-title: The Circle of Our Impact/Encouraging Ourselves
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic misses all of the signs of true love when she puts her trust in a bouquet tossed at a wedding.

programme.title: Who's Going to Watch Me Win?

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Everyone likes to jam out to our favorite song on the radio. Thanks to Samuel Morse and Reginald Fessenden's efforts, this became a possibility. In this episode discover the evolution of mass communications.

programme.title: Bible Man

programme.title: Sea Kids

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Carmela prepares to lead her first solo mission with Mending Kids, providing medical care to sick children worldwide. Lacey sends her off with a surprise fiesta that brings her back to her Peruvian roots.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Sheri founded Happy Hats to bring joy back to sick children while they receive treatment. Lacey plans an elegant Tea Party to show how Happy Hats make a difference.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Dr Ifunanya Nweke founded Jazz Hands for Autism to empower neurodivergent creatives. Lacey plans to throw Ifu an incredible Christmas party to thank her for supporting the community.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Circle of Our Impact/Encouraging Ourselves
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.sub-title: The Biblical Attitude to Work Pt2
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden

programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.sub-title: The Most Important Things I Have Learned in My Life - Part 2

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.desc: The power of the Holy Spirit in conviction, conversion and living. John 14 (Sacramento 1983).

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Circle of Our Impact/Encouraging Ourselves
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The Most Important Things I Have Learned in My Life - Part 2
programme.desc: Experience is a priceless teacher. Today, Joyce shares how every trial builds strength, deepens faith, and prepares you for God's next chapter in your life.

programme.title: A Thousand Tomorrows
programme.desc: Settling into ranch and rodeo life, Cody and Ali must answer the ultimate question: How will they spend the tomorrows' God has given them?

programme.title: Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: A young girl struggles after a traumatic horse riding accident causes her to lose her eyesight. Charles, the head trainer of Southeastern Guide Dogs, trains Apple, a miniature horse, to be her companion and surrogate eyes.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles to help people become happy students of Jesus and live a meaningful life in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part one of Your Checklist for Prayer, Pastor Bayless encourages you to think about an important question before you pray: Is your request promised in the Bible?

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Jesus Saves, Heals And Renews Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of grace. His desire is to help believers understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by God.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Madame Blueberry lives in a nice treehouse, and has lots of friends, but is upset because she always thinks she needs more "stuff". Eventually, she learns that it's important to be thankful for what you already have.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Set Free to Follow God Pt17
programme.desc: God's rescue of his people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people, but bring them into a life-giving relationship that is part of His plan.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault, blending flying, exploring, camp life, fishing, hunting, and cooking wild game.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Join Jeni and her friends as they travel to northern Michigan in the middle of winter. The focus of this series is to learn more about God's character through great women of the bible.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Kels takes a trip to Smorgasburg to find all of the food gems while Allie kayaks up an appetite.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The Most Important Things I Have Learned in My Life - Part 3
programme.desc: Waiting on answers? Joyce shows how faith and patience work together-and why forgiving others frees your heart to receive all God has for you.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: A Thousand Tomorrows
programme.desc: Settling into ranch and rodeo life, Cody and Ali must answer the ultimate question: How will they spend the tomorrows' God has given them?

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show celebrating the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics like dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality. Three Chairs will make you think and smile.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, AROUND THE WORLD gets little ones singing and praising God!

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: In Brisbane, Kristine Vicca is at the forefront of a movement that's changing lives. Through Strong Women Talking, she's empowering First Nations women to heal from trauma.

programme.title: TV4DADS: Australian Adventure
programme.desc: TV4Dads host, Brian Molitor explores the beautiful country of Australia, meets with some incredible people, and finds adventure along the way.

programme.title: My Why
programme.desc: Mywhy.tv is a project that is designed to bring the message of Jesus to the forefront of the pop culture conversation through the art of storytelling.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing faith through music.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Good News in a Parched Land
